name: Freezer Mix Meat and Potato Favorite
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the container of frozen mix into hot water just to loosen.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, heat the frozen mix and water to boiling.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer, stirring frequently, until the mix is thawed, about 20 minutes.
4. Heat oven to 375°F.
5. Place half the potato rounds in an ungreased 1 1/2-quart casserole.
6. Pour the meat mixture over the potato rounds.
7. Top with remaining potato rounds.
8. Cover and bake for 25 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake until the potato rounds are brown, about 10 minutes longer.
